name: KAMI KASUI NO JUTSU (PAPER SPIKE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Kamiton)

Rank: 3

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 16

Components: E, F, S

Paper laying on the ground below a target springs to life and becomes a deadly trap. The user creates spikes that deals 1d4 piercing damage to creatures in the area. Creatures must make a Spot check to notice the paper spikes (DC 15).

Any creature that steps on the paper spikes reduces their land speed by half until the damage dealt by the spike has been healed.

This technique can not affect items bearing Chakra Symbols (such as an exploding tag or advanced seal).

Requires: 5 ranks Craft (Visual Arts)

Material Focus: 1 page of paper per object made.

Empower: The user may spend 1 point of chakra to create an additional square up to 1 per level (maximum 10 squares).

Mastery: Each step increases adds an additional 5 ft. square.

Every odd step increases the Spot DC by 2.

The fifth step in mastery also allows the user to affect items bearing Chakra Symbols (such as an exploding tag or advanced seal). At which point this technique cannot solidify more than one Chakra-bearing object (like an exploding tag or advanced seal) among the objects it affects. If such an object hits a creature, they have a -4 Reflex save against the object, unless it is removed before it activates.
